title: Erasable Pens, 0.7mm Rub Out Pens, Friction Pen with Rubbers on the End, 8pcs Eraser Gel Writing Pens for Kids Adults Office School Supplies
features: Easy Correction: Thermal ink friction disappears, can be modified at any time without trace, goodbye to full-page graffiti, compared with the traditional correction tape, to achieve multiple cycles of use of a single page, always maintain the professional texture of the document

Efficient 8-colour Set: 0.7mm precision erasable pens with classic black and blue + purple/red/orange/green/blue/light blue, 8 colours to easily classify and mark key items, efficiently plan task priorities, enrich your writing needs
Smooth Writing: 0.7mm fine nib frixion erasable pens with cap design for portability, smooth ink for smooth writing, easy to modify without leaving marks.

Widely Used: Eraser pen is suitable for classroom notes, meeting minutes and creative drawings, compatible with A4 notebooks, planners, art drawing paper (not recommended for important voucher documents)

Usage Caution: The use of heat-sensitive ink technology (the handwriting will temporarily fade at high temperatures above 50 ° C), it is recommended that daily storage to avoid direct sunlight area, if the accidental disappearance of the handwriting by the heat, can be restored after freezing
